business_hours.days: Monday through Friday, Saturday (9 AM to 12 PM Eastern for emergencies only)

emergency_definition: anything that could leave a building unprotected
emergency_fallback: tell the caller to immediately contact the local fire department and that we will call back within 10 minutes
non_emergency_routing_rules: message only with name, company name, callback number, and description of the issue

call_transfer_rules.retries: one retry to the next contact in the emergency routing rules
call_transfer_rules.if_transfer_fails: tell the caller to immediately contact the local fire department and that we will call back within 10 minutes

integration_constraints: never create a sprinkler inspection job in Zuper directly
never create a fire alarm job in Zuper directly
after_hours_flow_summary: emergency calls are routed to on-call contacts, non-emergency calls are messaged and followed up next business day
notes: always get the company name, building address, and building occupancy type for every job
